environment.name: OrionDeploy
environment.description: Internal CLI for a fictional service mesh. Three services: orion-api (us-east-1, us-west-2, eu-west-1; team alpha), orion-worker (us-east-1, us-west-2; team beta), orion-dashboard (us-east-1; team gamma). CLI verbs: deploy, rollback, status, logs, vpn-pin, config, archive.
premises: Routing is hardcoded in routing.yaml; the system predates service discovery as a goal.
Feature flags live in orion-flags, not exposed through the CLI at all.
Logs are stored 7 days unless archived via 'orion archive'.

trajectories.title: First eu-west-1 deploy attempt for orion-api

events.text: deploy submitted; ERROR: auth failed; rolled back
auth gateway: VPN unpinned for region eu-west-1
deploy submitted; SUCCESS; orion-api eu-west-1 now v2.4.0

learned_facts.text: orion-api deploys to eu-west-1 require 'orion vpn-pin eu-west-1' first; otherwise auth fails silently after the deploy is submitted.
Correct sequence for eu-west-1: orion vpn-pin eu-west-1 → orion deploy ...

trajectories.title: Worker version drift causes message drop

events.text: alert: orion-worker dropping messages in us-east-1 region
orion-api us-east-1 v2.4.0; us-west-2 v2.4.0; eu-west-1 v2.4.0
rollback to v2.5.0 complete; messages flowing

learned_facts.text: If orion-worker exceeds orion-api by more than 1 minor version, queue messages get dropped.
Worker version must be ≤ orion-api version + 1 minor.
orion-worker us-east-1 was rolled back from v2.6.0 to v2.5.0 to match orion-api v2.4.0.

trajectories.title: Dashboard deploy fails outside the window

events.text: deploy rejected: outside deploy window (allowed 00:00-04:00 UTC)
scheduled deploy SUCCESS at 02:14 UTC; v1.9.0

learned_facts.text: orion-dashboard can only be deployed during 00:00-04:00 UTC; outside that window the deploy is rejected.
To deploy orion-dashboard outside the window, use --schedule with a time inside 00:00-04:00 UTC.
orion-dashboard us-east-1 v1.9.0 deployed at 02:14 UTC.

trajectories.title: Rollback that didn't roll back the config

events.text: alert: orion-api us-west-2 still serving 502 on /v2/items
config still at v2.4.0 schema; binary at v2.3.0
orion config restore orion-api us-west-2 v2.3.0

learned_facts.text: orion rollback rolls back the binary only; config is left at the newer schema and can cause 5xx until 'orion config restore' is run.
Full rollback = orion rollback <svc> <region> + orion config restore <svc> <region> <version>.

trajectories.title: Asking about a feature flag the CLI can't toggle

events.text: orion flag set orion-api new_search=true us-east-1
verbs: deploy rollback status logs vpn-pin config archive
note: feature flags are managed in orion-flags service, not via this CLI

learned_facts.text: Feature flag operations are not in the orion CLI. They live in the orion-flags service.
orion-flags is shared across all services; toggling there affects orion-api, orion-worker, orion-dashboard.
